user.title: Envi App Login
user.description: Use the same email and password you use in the **Envi mobile app** (the app that controls your heater). This is not your eheat.com store account — the integration talks to Envi's cloud, so you must use your Envi app login.

data_description.email: The email you use to log in to the Envi mobile app (not eheat.com).
data_description.password: The password you use to log in to the Envi mobile app.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Use the same credentials as in the Envi mobile app (not eheat.com).
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Envi API. Please check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Envi account is already configured.

init.title: Smart Envi Options
init.description: Choose what you want to configure.

integration_options.title: Integration Settings
integration_options.description: Configure how often the integration checks for device updates and how long to wait for API responses.

data_description.scan_interval:
How often to check for device updates.

• Default: 30 seconds (recommended)
• Range: 10-300 seconds
• Lower values = more frequent updates but higher API usage
• Higher values = less API usage but slower response to changes
• Minimum 10 seconds to avoid API rate limiting
data_description.api_timeout:
Maximum time to wait for API responses.

• Default: 15 seconds (recommended)
• Range: 5-60 seconds
• Increase if you have slow internet or frequent timeout errors
• Decrease if you want faster failure detection

select_device.title: Select Device
select_device.description: Choose a heater to edit its schedule.

data_description.entity_id: Select the Smart Envi heater whose schedule you want to edit.

edit_schedule.title: Edit Schedule
edit_schedule.description: Configure the heating schedule for this device. Set times when the heater should automatically change temperature.

data_description.enabled: Turn the schedule on or off. When disabled, the schedule will not run and the heater will maintain its current setting.
data_description.name: Optional name for this schedule (e.g., 'Weekday Schedule', 'Weekend Schedule').
data_description.time_entries:
Schedule time entries in format: HH:MM:SS,temperature,enabled

Separate multiple entries with | (pipe character)
Temperature range: 50-86°F
Enabled: true or false

📋 EXAMPLES:
• Single entry: 08:00:00,72,true
• Two entries: 08:00:00,72,true|18:00:00,68,true

📅 SAMPLE SCHEDULES:
• Morning/Evening:
  07:00:00,72,true|22:00:00,68,true

• Work Day (away during day):
  06:00:00,70,true|08:00:00,62,true|17:00:00,70,true|22:00:00,65,true

• Weekend (sleep in):
  08:00:00,70,true|23:00:00,68,true

• All Day Comfort:
  00:00:00,70,true

error.schedule_update_failed: Failed to update schedule. Please try again.
